pr_title: Add email validation for the signup and login forms
pr_description: Adds validate_email_signup() and validate_email_login() so both forms reject malformed email addresses before submission.
injected_issue: validate_email_signup() and validate_email_login() are byte-for-byte duplicated function bodies (same strip/length/regex checks) that should be extracted into a single shared helper -- a maintainability smell, not a functional bug.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: Both functions behave identically and every test passes; test suites verify behavior, not the absence of duplication, so copy-pasted logic never surfaces as a failure.
